query:
-- Apollo credits used today and this month
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as today_used,
  SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as month_used,
  300 as daily_cap,
  2200 as monthly_cap,
  300 - SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as daily_remaining,
  2200 - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(createdAt) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(createdAt) = MONTH(NOW()) THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as monthly_remaining
FROM apolloCreditLog;
